strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, Code generators)
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective founder) demonstrating innovation and leadership
concerns: Limited direct experience with cloud platform strategy or AI product development at scale
No advanced AI-related degree (Master's/PhD) despite long career
Most recent role focuses heavily on full-stack development rather than strategic AI/cloud leadership
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical breadth and entrepreneurial drive through GISCollective and his varied engineering roles. However, his resume lacks clear evidence of cloud strategy formulation or AI product leadership at the director level. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not yet at the scale or strategic focus required for this role. The combination of strengths suggests potential with some development needed in strategic cloud/AI areas.
